scripts.mobile:sync: vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:apk: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:apk:release: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.mobile:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
